channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Why are World Cup tickets so expensive?
item.description: The 2026 World Cup is not only the biggest World Cup in history. It’s the most expensive.

item.title: Iran war day 76: Vance says progress made in talks; Israel pounds Lebanon
item.description: US Vice President Vance says progress is being made in talks with Iran as President Trump begins his trip to China.

item.title: Trump in China for talks with Xi Jinping
item.description: Trump visits Beijing for high-stakes summit with Xi as Iran, trade and Taiwan strain US-China ties.

item.title: Iran’s US-bound World Cup squad given public sendoff in Tehran
item.description: Thousands of people cheered Team Melli as Iran's World Cup kit was unveiled before the team's training camp in Turkiye.

item.title: Cavaliers rally late, beat Pistons for 3-2 lead in NBA Playoff semifinals
item.description: Cleveland Cavaliers beat Detroit Pistons 117-113 in overtime on the back of Harden's 30 points in Game 5 of the series.

item.title: Madonna, Shakira, BTS to headline World Cup final half-time show
item.description: Coldplay's Chris Martin will curate the show during the July 19 final at the MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, FIFA says.

item.title: Kyiv building collapses after Russian strike, reportedly trapping residents
item.description: Russia attacked the Ukrainian capital Kyiv with drones and missiles, damaging several buildings.

item.title: Trump, Xi speak ahead of talks to make relations ‘better than ever’
item.description: Presidents Xi Jinping and Donald Trump say they’re looking forward to US-China talks.

item.title: Students in Caracas to demand release of political prisoners
item.description: Students from Venezuela’s leading universities blocked the main highway in Caracas to demand the immediate release of po

item.title: Xi Jinping welcomes Donald Trump with ceremony ahead of high-stakes meeting
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping is welcoming US President Donald Trump to Beijing for high-level talks. Tariffs, competitio

item.title: Iran war: Why the BRICS foreign ministers meeting in India matters
item.description: The foreign ministers meeting is taking place before the 2026 BRICS summit in India in September.

item.title: Families demand release of Pakistani crew captured by Somali pirates
item.description: Families of 10 Pakistani crew members taken hostage by Somali pirates have rallied in Karachi to demand their release.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran slams ‘collusion’ as Netanyahu ‘secretly’ visits UAE
item.description: Iranian first vice president said Tehran's 'right' to the Strait of Hormuz is 'established and the matter is closed'.

item.title: Trump-Xi summit live: US, China leaders holding talks on trade, tech, Iran
item.description: Trump and Xi's summit comes at a crucial moment for the global economy, as the war on Iran continues to disrupt trade.

item.title: Trump administration offers $100m in aid to Cuba in exchange for reform
item.description: Amid an oil blockade against the island, the US blames Cuba's communist leadership for 'standing in the way' of aid.

item.title: Memphis residents file lawsuit alleging abuses by Trump-backed task force
item.description: Lawsuit says task force comprised of state and federal agencies harassed bystanders who recorded enforcement activities.

item.title: Man City beat Palace to close gap with Arsenal to 2, with two games to play
item.description: Manchester City overcome Crystal Palace 3-0 to cut Arsenal's Premier League lead to two points as season finale looms.

item.title: Trump taps David Venturella, former private prison executive, to lead ICE
item.description: Venturella will helm the immigration enforcement agency after previously serving in an executive role at GEO Group.

item.title: Funeral held for two Lebanese paramedics killed in Israeli attack
item.description: Hundreds of mourners gathered for the funeral of two Lebanese paramedics killed by an Israeli strike

item.title: Trump-Xi summit: Why Beijing might have the advantage
item.description: Trade between the two countries has suffered since Trump came into office even as China's exports have hit new highs.

item.title: Philip Davis and Progressive Liberal Party win general election in Bahamas
item.description: The victory marks the first time in three decades a Bahamian political party has noticed back-to-back election wins.

item.title: Why Louisiana paused its US House primary election amid redistricting push
item.description: Louisiana governor suspends vote following Supreme Court ruling; critics say move sows confusion and violates law.

item.title: Crowds gather in Tehran to send off Iran’s World Cup team
item.description: Huge crowds gathered in Tehran’s Revolution Square to celebrate and send off Iran’s national football team.

item.title: US waives visa bonds of up to $15,000 for FIFA World Cup ticket holders
item.description: Trump administration's visa bond programme had raised concerns about soaring costs for World Cup travellers to US.

item.title: Five things you may not know about US-China ties
item.description: Al Jazeera’s @avawarrinerr explains five things you may not know about the ties connecting China and the US.
